title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・遠雷を聞きて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan fails to claim victory, she
comes to a realization after experiencing such a
ferocious race against Tamamo Cross and Oguri
Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Learning that she still has many rivals she wishes
to surpass, and that racing with them will bring
her opportunities to run with every ounce of her
being...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan realizes that as long as she has
rivals, her potential for growth will remain
limitless. This epiphany leaves her unable to
contain her excitement for our next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Around this time, Sakura Chiyono O watches the
autumn Tenno Sho on TV and sees Mejiro Ardan's
growth as a racer with her own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan begins her preparation for the
Osaka Hai. She remains entirely oblivious,
however, to the shadow now cast over Sakura
Chiyono O's face...
